2026-06-19T08:56:26.2310613Z ##[group]Run set -euo pipefail
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2311004Z [36;1mset -euo pipefail[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2311421Z [36;1m# actions/download-artifact (>=v5) flattens contents directly into `path/`[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2311944Z [36;1m# whenever exactly one artifact matches the pattern, ignoring[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2312450Z [36;1m# `merge-multiple: false`. Re-shape into the per-group subdir layout so[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2312981Z [36;1m# downstream validation sees a stable structure regardless of matrix size.[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2313404Z [36;1m# Upstream reference:[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2313864Z [36;1m# https://github.com/actions/download-artifact/blob/v8.0.1/src/download-artifact.ts[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2314727Z [36;1m# (see the `isSingleArtifactDownload || mergeMultiple || artifacts.length === 1`[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2315293Z [36;1m# branch). Remove this step once download-artifact stops flattening or[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2315706Z [36;1m# exposes an opt-out.[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2316128Z [36;1mexpected_count=$(echo "$EXPECTED_MATRIX" | jq '.group // [] | length')[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2316552Z [36;1mif [ "$expected_count" -eq 1 ]; then[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2316926Z [36;1m  group_id=$(echo "$EXPECTED_MATRIX" | jq -r '.group[0].id')[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2317420Z [36;1m  # Defence-in-depth: group_id is interpolated into a shell path. apm-prep[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2317971Z [36;1m  # produces a sanitised id today, but enforce a strict allowlist here so[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2318466Z [36;1m  # any future schema drift cannot smuggle traversal sequences.[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2318924Z [36;1m  if ! printf '%s' "$group_id" | grep -Eq '^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$'; then[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2319395Z [36;1m    echo "::error::unsafe group_id '$group_id' (must match ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$)"[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2319781Z [36;1m    exit 1[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2320011Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2320349Z [36;1m  group_dir="/tmp/gh-aw/apm-bundles/${ARTIFACT_PREFIX}apm-${group_id}"[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2320744Z [36;1m  if [ ! -d "$group_dir" ]; then[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2321212Z [36;1m    mkdir -p "$group_dir"[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2321705Z [36;1m    find /tmp/gh-aw/apm-bundles -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -path "$group_dir" -exec mv {} "$group_dir/" \;[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2322182Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2322384Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2356295Z shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2356592Z env:
2026-06-19T08:56:26.2356811Z   DEFAULT_BRANCH: main
